notes: Onboarding now includes an optional opt-in to receive occasional product-update emails.
🚀 New "Viral this month" section on 30-Day Trends — highlights breakout videos, each with an expandable 30-day daily-views trajectory chart.
30-Day Trends: the Top-25 list now shows the most-watched videos *published* in the last 30 days, so the title matches the content.
30-Day Trends: "Archive" renamed to "Older videos (>30d)" with a plain-English explanation of what it measures.
Season charts: legends moved above the bars (no longer overlap club names) and ordered Long / Shorts / Live everywhere.
Daily Recap: added a per-league "Δ Channel Views per day" chart below the league summary.
Smarter AI notes: the "latest videos" note now reads video descriptions for richer context and no longer mis-reports league standings from throwback clips.
YouTube view-count latency banner now appears only when counts are actually lagging — and was added to the WC2026 Trends page.
Initial release — Daily Recap, 30-Day Trends, Season, All-Time Top, Latest Videos, FIFA World Cup 2026, and per-club pages.
